grammar_points.name: 简单的结果补语 (Simple Complement of Result)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词 + 结果补语 表示动作的结果。常用的结果补语有：完、好、见、到等。例如：写完、看好、听见、找到。

examples.pinyin: Zuòyè dōu xiěwán le.
examples.english: I've finished all the homework.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ yǐjīng zhǎohǎo fànguǎn le.
examples.english: I've already found a restaurant.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ méi kànjiàn tā.
examples.english: I didn't see him.

grammar_points.name: 还没...呢 (Not yet)
grammar_points.explanation: 还没 + 动词/形容词 + 呢 表示动作或状态还没有发生或完成。

examples.chinese: 我还没想好要不要去呢。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ hái méi xiǎnghǎo yào bu yào qù ne.
examples.english: I haven't decided yet whether to go.

examples.pinyin: Fàn hái méi zuòhǎo ne.
examples.english: The food isn't ready yet.

grammar_points.name: 时段的表达 (Expressing Duration of Time)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示动作持续的时间：动词 + 时段。表示在多长时间内完成：在 + 时段 + 内 + 动词。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ xué le yí ge xiǎoshí Hànyǔ.
examples.english: I studied Chinese for an hour.

examples.chinese: 他在一个小时内写完了作业。
examples.pinyin: Tā zài yí ge xiǎoshí nèi xiěwán le zuòyè.
examples.english: He finished the homework within an hour.

grammar_points.name: 时间的表达 (Expressing Time)
grammar_points.explanation: 用'...的时候'表示动作发生的时间。'来/去 + 时间 + 的 + 动词'表示在某段时间内做某事。

examples.chinese: 我来中国以前不会说汉语。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ lái Zhōngguó yǐqián bú huì shuō Hànyǔ.
examples.english: I couldn't speak Chinese before I came to China.

examples.chinese: 下班的时候，我给他打了个电话。
examples.pinyin: Xiàbān de shíhou, wǒ gěi tā dǎ le ge diànhuà.
examples.english: I called him when I got off work.

grammar_points.name: 可能补语 (Complements of Possibility)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词 + 得/不 + 补语 表示动作能否达到某种结果。肯定形式：V+得+补语；否定形式：V+不+补语。

examples.pinyin: Zhège zì wǒ kàn bu qīngchu.
examples.english: I can't see this character clearly.

examples.pinyin: Zhège cài chī de wán ma?
examples.english: Can this dish be finished?

examples.pinyin: Wǒ zhǎo de dào nàge dìfang.
examples.english: I can find that place.

grammar_points.name: "N+呢"询问处所 (Using 'N+呢' to Ask about Location)
grammar_points.explanation: 名词 + 呢 表示询问人或事物在哪里。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ de bāo ne?
examples.english: Where is my bag?

examples.pinyin: Tā ne?
examples.english: Where is he?

grammar_points.name: "刚"和"刚才" (Comparison of '刚' and '刚才')
grammar_points.explanation: '刚'是副词，表示动作刚刚发生，强调时间短。'刚才'是时间名词，表示不久前的时间。

examples.pinyin: Tā gāng zǒu.
examples.english: He just left.

examples.pinyin: Gāngcái tā háishì zài zhèr.
examples.english: He was still here just now.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ gāng chīwán fàn.
examples.english: I just finished eating.

grammar_points.name: "才"表示迟缓 ('才' Indicating Slowness)
grammar_points.explanation: '才' + 动词 表示动作发生得比预期的晚或慢。

examples.pinyin: Nǐ zěnme cái lái?
examples.english: Why are you only coming now?

examples.chinese: 他八点上课，七点半才起床。
examples.pinyin: Tā bā diǎn shàngkè, qī diǎn bàn cái qǐchuáng.
examples.english: He has class at 8, but only got up at 7:30.

grammar_points.name: 经历的表达 (Expressing Experiences)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词 + 过 表示过去的经历。否定用'没+动词+过'。疑问用'...动词+过...吗？'

examples.pinyin: Nǐ chī guo zhōngyào ma?
examples.english: Have you ever taken Chinese medicine?

examples.pinyin: Wǒ méi qù guo Běijīng.
examples.english: I've never been to Beijing.

examples.pinyin: Tā xué guo liǎng nián Hànyǔ.
examples.english: He studied Chinese for two years.

grammar_points.name: 程度补语 (Complement of Degree)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词/形容词 + 得 + 程度补语 表示动作达到的程度。

examples.pinyin: Tā lèi de bùxiǎng shuōhuà.
examples.english: He's so tired he doesn't want to talk.

examples.pinyin: Tā gāoxìng de tiào le qǐlái.
examples.english: She was so happy she jumped up.

grammar_points.name: "对...感兴趣" (To Be Interested In)
grammar_points.explanation: 对 + 人/事物 + 感兴趣 表示对某人或某事物有兴趣。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ duì Hànyǔ hěn gǎn xìngqù.
examples.english: I'm very interested in Chinese.

examples.pinyin: Tā duì yīnyuè bù gǎn xìngqù.
examples.english: He's not interested in music.

grammar_points.name: "一直" (Always/All Along)
grammar_points.explanation: '一直' + 动词/形容词 表示动作或状态持续不变。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ yìzhí zhù zài zhèlǐ.
examples.english: I've always lived here.

examples.pinyin: Tā yìzhí zài xuéxí.
examples.english: He's been studying all along.

grammar_points.name: "又...又..." (Both... And...)
grammar_points.explanation: 又 + 形容词/动词 + 又 + 形容词/动词 表示同时具有两种性质或状态。

examples.pinyin: Zhège píngguǒ yòu dà yòu tián.
examples.english: This apple is both big and sweet.

examples.pinyin: Tā yòu cōngming yòu piàoliang.
examples.english: She's both smart and beautiful.

grammar_points.name: "还是" vs "或者" (Comparison of '还是' and '或者')
grammar_points.explanation: '还是'用于疑问句，'或者'用于陈述句。两者都表示选择。

examples.pinyin: Nǐ hē chá háishì hē kāfēi?
examples.english: Do you want tea or coffee?

examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng hē chá huòzhě kāfēi.
examples.english: I want tea or coffee.

grammar_points.name: 概数的表达 (Approximate Numbers)
grammar_points.explanation: 用'几'、'多'、'左右'、'差不多'等表示概数。

examples.pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī yǒu wǔbǎi duō rén.
examples.english: Our company has more than 500 people.

examples.chinese: 会议大概两个小时左右。
examples.pinyin: Huìyì dàgài liǎng ge xiǎoshí zuǒyòu.
examples.english: The meeting is about two hours.

grammar_points.name: "越A越B" (The More... The More...)
grammar_points.explanation: 越 + 形容词/动词 + 越 + 形容词/动词 表示程度随着条件的变化而变化。

examples.pinyin: Tiānqì yuè lái yuè lěng le.
examples.english: The weather is getting colder and colder.

examples.pinyin: Tā yuè xué yuè yǒu xìngqù.
examples.english: The more he studies, the more interested he becomes.

grammar_points.name: 比较句1: A跟B一样 (Comparison 1: A is the Same as B)
grammar_points.explanation: A + 跟 + B + 一样 + (形容词) 表示两者相同。

examples.pinyin: Tā de Hànyǔ gēn wǒ yíyàng hǎo.
examples.english: His Chinese is as good as mine.

examples.pinyin: Zhè běn shū gēn nà běn yíyàng.
examples.english: This book is the same as that one.

title: 我把礼物放在桌子上了

grammar_points.name: "把"字句1: A把B + V (The Ba-Sentence 1)
grammar_points.explanation: 把字句强调对动作对象的处置或影响。结构：主语 + 把 + 宾语 + 动词 + 其他成分。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ shū fàng zài zhuōzi shang le.
examples.english: I put the book on the table.

examples.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ mén guānshang.
examples.english: Please close the door.

grammar_points.name: 概数的表达2: 左右 (Approximate Numbers 2: '左右')
grammar_points.explanation: 数量词 + 左右 表示大约的数量。

examples.chinese: 这个城市有五百万左右人口。
examples.pinyin: Zhège chéngshì yǒu wǔbǎi wàn zuǒyòu rénkǒu.
examples.english: This city has about 5 million people.

examples.chinese: 会议大约三个小时左右。
examples.pinyin: Huìyì dàgài sān ge xiǎoshí zuǒyòu.
examples.english: The meeting is about three hours.

grammar_points.name: "才" vs "就" (Comparison of '才' and '就')
grammar_points.explanation: '才'表示动作发生得晚或慢，'就'表示动作发生得早或快。

examples.pinyin: Tā bā diǎn cái lái.
examples.english: He came at 8 (later than expected).

examples.pinyin: Tā liù diǎn jiù lái le.
examples.english: He came at 6 (earlier than expected).

grammar_points.name: "把"字句2 (The Ba-Sentence 2)
grammar_points.explanation: 把字句中动词后带有'在/到/给'等介词短语表示动作的结果位置。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ chē tíng zài ménkǒu le.
examples.english: I parked the car at the entrance.

examples.pinyin: Bǎ shū gěi wǒ.
examples.english: Give the book to me.

grammar_points.name: 复合趋向补语 (Compound Complements of Direction)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词 + 上/下/进/出/回/过 + 来/去 表示动作的方向。

examples.pinyin: Tā zǒu jìnlái le.
examples.english: He walked in.

examples.pinyin: Qǐng bǎ shū ná chūqù.
examples.english: Please take the book out.

examples.pinyin: Tā pǎo shàng lóu qù le.
examples.english: He ran upstairs.

grammar_points.name: "先...，再/又...，然后..." (First... Then... And Then...)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示动作的先后顺序。

examples.chinese: 我先吃饭，再洗澡，然后睡觉。
examples.pinyin: Wǒ xiān chīfàn, zài xǐzǎo, ránhòu shuìjiào.
examples.english: I'll eat first, then shower, and then sleep.

examples.pinyin: Nǐ xiān xiě zuòyè, zài kàn diànshì.
examples.english: Do your homework first, then watch TV.

grammar_points.name: 比较句2: A比B+Adj+一点儿/一些/得多 (Comparison 2)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示两者程度的差异。'一点儿'表示差异小，'得多'表示差异大。

examples.pinyin: Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng yìdiǎnr.
examples.english: Today is a bit colder than yesterday.

examples.pinyin: Tā bǐ wǒ gāo de duō.
examples.english: He is much taller than me.

grammar_points.name: "把"字句3 (The Ba-Sentence 3)
grammar_points.explanation: 把字句中动词后带有结果补语或趋向补语。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ bǎ zuòyè xiěwán le.
examples.english: I finished the homework.

examples.pinyin: Bǎ shuǐguǒ ná guòlái.
examples.english: Bring the fruit over.

grammar_points.name: "除了...以外，还..." (Besides... Also...)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示除了提到的以外，还有其他的。

examples.chinese: 除了汉语以外，我还学英语。
examples.pinyin: Chúle Hànyǔ yǐwài, wǒ hái xué Yīngyǔ.
examples.english: Besides Chinese, I also study English.

examples.chinese: 除了他以外，我们都去过。
examples.pinyin: Chúle tā yǐwài, wǒmen dōu qù guo.
examples.english: Except for him, we've all been there.

grammar_points.name: "...得...的话，...就..." (If... Then...)
grammar_points.explanation: 假设复句，表示如果某种情况发生，就会产生某种结果。

examples.chinese: 如果你来的话，我就不去。
examples.pinyin: Rúguǒ nǐ lái de huà, wǒ jiù bú qù.
examples.english: If you come, I won't go.

examples.chinese: 要是下雨的话，比赛就取消。
examples.pinyin: Yàoshi xiàyǔ de huà, bǐsài jiù qǔxiāo.
examples.english: If it rains, the match will be cancelled.

grammar_points.name: 复杂的状态补语 (Complex Complements of State)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词 + 得 + 很 + 形容词/形容词短语 表示程度很高。

examples.chinese: 他累得下了班就想睡觉。
examples.pinyin: Tā lèi de xià le bān jiù xiǎng shuìjiào.
examples.english: He's so tired that he wants to sleep right after work.

examples.chinese: 她高兴得不知道说什么好。
examples.pinyin: Tā gāoxìng de bù zhīdào shuō shénme hǎo.
examples.english: She was so happy she didn't know what to say.

grammar_points.name: "谁/什么/哪儿都..." (Flexible Use of Interrogative Pronouns)
grammar_points.explanation: 疑问代词 + 都/也 表示全部否定或肯定。

examples.pinyin: Shéi dōu zhīdào zhè jiàn shì.
examples.english: Everyone knows about this.

examples.pinyin: Tā shénme dōu méi shuō.
examples.english: He didn't say anything.

examples.pinyin: Nǎr yě méi qù.
examples.english: Didn't go anywhere.

grammar_points.name: 双音节动词重叠 (Reduplication of Disyllabic Verbs)
grammar_points.explanation: ABAB式表示动作时间短、尝试或轻松。

examples.chinese: 我们讨论讨论这个问题。
examples.pinyin: Wǒmen tǎolùn tǎolùn zhège wèntí.
examples.english: Let's discuss this problem.

examples.pinyin: Nǐ xiūxi xiūxi ba.
examples.english: Take a rest.

grammar_points.name: "不但...而且..." (Not Only... But Also...)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示递进关系，后一分句比前一分句更进一层。

examples.chinese: 他不但会说汉语，而且说得很好。
examples.pinyin: Tā búdàn huì shuō Hànyǔ, érqiě shuō de hěn hǎo.
examples.english: He not only speaks Chinese, but speaks it very well.

examples.chinese: 这个地方不但风景美，而且空气好。
examples.pinyin: Zhège dìfang búdàn fēngjǐng měi, érqiě kōngqì hǎo.
examples.english: This place not only has beautiful scenery but also good air.

grammar_points.name: 介词"关于" (The Preposition '关于')
grammar_points.explanation: '关于' + 名词/名词短语 表示涉及的对象或话题。

examples.chinese: 这是一本关于中国历史的书。
examples.pinyin: Zhè shì yì běn guānyú Zhōngguó lìshǐ de shū.
examples.english: This is a book about Chinese history.

examples.chinese: 关于这个问题，我们再讨论。
examples.pinyin: Guānyú zhège wèntí, wǒmen zài tǎolùn.
examples.english: Let's discuss this problem again.

grammar_points.name: 趋向补语的引申义 (Extension of Complements of Direction)
grammar_points.explanation: '起来'可以表示开始某种动作或状态，'下去'表示继续。

examples.pinyin: Tiānqì rè qǐlái le.
examples.english: The weather is getting hot.

examples.pinyin: Qǐng nǐ jìxù shuō xiàqù.
examples.english: Please continue speaking.

grammar_points.name: "刚"、"刚才"、"才"的比较 (Comparison of '刚', '刚才', '才')
grammar_points.explanation: '刚'是副词，'刚才'是时间名词，'才'强调迟缓或条件。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ gāng chīwán fàn.
examples.english: I just finished eating.

examples.pinyin: Gāngcái nǐ hái shuō bùxiǎng qù.
examples.english: Just now you said you didn't want to go.

examples.pinyin: Tā zǒu le cái wǔ fēnzhōng.
examples.english: He's only been gone five minutes.

grammar_points.name: "被"字句 (The Bei-Sentence)
grammar_points.explanation: 被动句，表示主语是动作的接受者。结构：主语 + 被 + 宾语 + 动词 + 其他成分。

examples.pinyin: Wǒ de qiánbāo bèi tōu le.
examples.english: My wallet was stolen.

examples.pinyin: Tā bèi lǎoshī biǎoyáng le.
examples.english: He was praised by the teacher.

examples.pinyin: Mén bèi fēng chuī kāi le.
examples.english: The door was blown open by the wind.

grammar_points.name: "正在" + V (In the Middle of Doing Something)
grammar_points.explanation: '正在' + 动词 表示动作正在进行中。

examples.pinyin: Tā zhèngzài dǎ diànhuà.
examples.english: He is making a phone call.

examples.pinyin: Wǒ zhèngzài chīfàn.
examples.english: I am eating.

examples.pinyin: Tāmen zhèngzài kāihuì.
examples.english: They are having a meeting.

grammar_points.name: 动作的进行 (Progressive Aspect)
grammar_points.explanation: 用'正在...呢'、'...着呢'表示动作正在进行或状态持续。

examples.pinyin: Wàimiàn xià zhe yǔ ne.
examples.english: It's raining outside.

examples.pinyin: Tā kàn zhe diànshì ne.
examples.english: He is watching TV.
